# Use-case landing page swarm

## When to use

Use when product has many verticals/workflows.

## Why it works

Specificity beats generic positioning.

## Mechanism

Each use case gets its own proof path.

## Required inputs

Page template, examples, testimonials.

## When not to use

If use cases are imaginary.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

Organic/search traffic, conversion by use case.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
